org.ships.vessel.common.types.typical.plane

Class PlaneType

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.ships.vessel.common.types.typical.AbstractShipType<Plane>
      • org.ships.vessel.common.types.typical.plane.PlaneType
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    org.core.utils.Identifiable, FuelledShipType<Plane>, SerializableShipType<Plane>, ShipType<Plane>

    public class PlaneType
extends AbstractShipType<Plane>
implements FuelledShipType<Plane>
